title: alpinia regia
intro: Alpinia regia, commonly known as the Golden Torch Ginger or White Ginger, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Alpinia regia is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing nausea and vomiting, relieving menstrual cramps, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Alpinia regia can be made into teas, tinctures, and oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
